findings.foreign_lock_still_active_rule: If a foreign lock holder remains active, close as evidence-only STOP_AND_DIAGNOSE.
findings.lock_clear_rule: If the lock clears and a clean owner snapshot is captured, that is sufficient to close the attribution contour as complete.
guardrails: A clean reread proves only current read-surface truth.
A clean reread does not itself authorize a new write contour.
rollout posture inspect is read-only and does not prove stage-advance permission by itself.
status and healthcheck remain separate gates.

notes: Step50 is closed as attribution reclassification only, not as write-lane reopening.
